title: sphedamnocarpus orbicularis
intro: Sphedamnocarpus orbicularis, also known as the orbicular spurge, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sphedamnocarpus orbicularis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
